hooks.command: filepath="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

filepath="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE 'src/data/(ibmCloudConfig|workloadPatterns|virtualizationOverhead|ibmCloudOSCompatibility|redhatOSCompatibility|vpcSecurityGroupTemplates)\.json$'; then echo 'WARN: Editing critical config file — verify this is intentional'; fi; exit 0
